## Action Taken

<!-- What was done in response? -->
- [ ] Reviewed report
- [ ] Contacted reporter (if appropriate)
- [ ] Blocked sender (if appropriate)
- [ ] Added to opt-out list
- [ ] Escalated to external authority
- [ ] Other:

<!-- Any additional steps required? -->

---

**Privacy Reminder:** 
- Do not paste full letter content, real names, or real email addresses in this issue
- Use generic descriptions ("sender A sent harassing content to recipient B")
- Keep detailed records in a private, secure location outside this repo
- This issue is for tracking and process documentation only
